title: Twitter @lmazare
summary: Neil showing Hibiki 🟢 running on an iphone. All local so whatever you say will stay on the iphone and latency is great! Get the code to build the ios app in our moshi-swift repo (it's brittle at the moment but we'll polish it 😅 )

title: Twitter @reach_vb
summary:
Fuck yeah! Multilingual Orpheus TTS 3B is here 🔥

> Zero shot voice cloning
> ~100ms streaming latency
> Apache 2.0 license
> Guided emotion and intonation
> Human like speech

Weights on the hub, Text to Speech scene on fire! 🤩 https://t.co/xJlCLKckj0
